items.title: apple/container
items.original_summary: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon. | 语言: Swift | Stars: 38,138 | Forks: 1,100 | 10,896 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Apple 推出 macOS 原生容器工具，用 Swift 写、基于轻量级 VM 跑 Linux 容器，Apple Silicon 深度优化。跟 Docker Desktop 抢饭碗，本地开发体验会有实质变化。
items.backend_focus: macOS 团队可直接安装替代 Docker Desktop，CPU/内存占用明显下降；CI 镜像需要重新验证 x86 与 arm64 兼容路径。

items.title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
items.original_summary: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks. | 语言: Python | Stars: 7,294 | Forks: 535 | 5,190 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: NVIDIA 开源 SkillSpector，专门扫描 AI Agent skill 文件里的漏洞和恶意模式。当大量 skill 被自动加载到 agent 运行时,供应链风险必须正视。
items.backend_focus: 建议接入 CI 流水线:对 agent 引入的第三方 skill 跑安全扫描,设置 fail-closed 策略,避免恶意 skill 直接执行 shell。

items.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.original_summary: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents. | 语言: Shell | Stars: 62,013 | Forks: 6,728 | 11,431 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Google 工程总监 Addy Osmani 整理的 AI 编码 Agent 技能集,号称 production-grade。社区热度高,但本质是把最佳实践打包成可复用 skill。
items.backend_focus: 可直接把 skills 目录挂到 Claude Code/Cursor,复用编码规范,缩短新人 PR 磨合期;内容偏流程规范,无 API 层面新能力。

items.title: phuryn/pm-skills
items.original_summary: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth. | 语言: N/A | Stars: 19,276 | Forks: 1,972 | 5,775 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: PM Skills Marketplace 收集 100+ agentic skills,覆盖产品全流程。从星标看主要靠营销传播,后端可直接忽略。
items.backend_focus: 包装大于实质,内容面向 PM 而非后端工程师,无需评估接入,除非团队在做 agent 平台需参考 skill 目录结构。

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.original_summary: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world | 语言: TypeScript | Stars: 124,843 | Forks: 6,775 | 6,246 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: iptv-org 老牌 IPTV 频道集合,长期上榜的常青项目。本周热度正常波动,没有功能性突破。
items.backend_focus: 仅在做直播聚合或合规审查时才需要关注,常规后端服务无影响,无 SDK/协议变更。

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.original_summary: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. | 语言: Python | Stars: 32,851 | Forks: 2,650 | 6,427 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Agent-Reach 给 AI Agent 装上互联网眼睛,聚合 Twitter/Reddit/YouTube/B站/小红书等数据源,主打零 API 费用。本质是爬虫封装,合规风险高。
items.backend_focus: 短期可作内部数据采集 PoC,但生产环境慎用:违反多平台 ToS,账号封禁和数据合规风险显著,不能作为正式数据源。

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.original_summary: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. | 语言: Python | Stars: 30,897 | Forks: 2,089 | 9,766 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Headroom 在 LLM 调用前压缩工具输出/日志/RAG 片段,号称省 60-95% token,提供库/代理/MCP 三种形态。这是 LLM 成本控制的关键组件。
items.backend_focus: 重点关注:可作为 LLM 网关旁路部署(8000 端口代理模式),对 tool call 返回值和日志先压缩再喂给模型,直接降 API 账单。

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.original_summary: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary | 语言: Python | Stars: 43,853 | Forks: 3,608 | 7,226 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: last30days-skill 是 Claude/Cursor 用的研究 skill,跨 Reddit/X/YouTube/HN 抓 30 天数据并合成摘要。属于 agent 工具集锦,非基础设施。
items.backend_focus: 直接装进 Claude Code 即可,适合做市场调研/竞品分析;后端无需改动,不要试图把它集成到生产 API 链路里。

items.title: music-assistant/server
items.original_summary: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike. | 语言: Python | Stars: 2,658 | Forks: 454 | 865 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: Music Assistant Server 是开源音乐媒体库管理服务,常驻在树莓派/NAS 上,聚合多家流媒体。星标基数小,热度自然增长。
items.backend_focus: 仅在自建家庭音乐系统或 NAS 媒体中台时相关,生产级后端架构没有可借鉴的新东西,API 协议不通用。

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.original_summary: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. | 语言: JavaScript | Stars: 43,038 | Forks: 7,133 | 1,220 stars this week
items.chinese_summary: asgeirtj 的 system_prompts_leaks 仓库持续抓取各家大模型的系统提示泄漏,包括 Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok 等。安全隐患但属安全研究范畴。
items.backend_focus: 建议每周 diff 一次 prompt 变更,及时调整自己的 prompt 工程策略;同时警醒:核心指令不能只靠 system prompt,必须服务端二次校验。
